creator: tremere@cainites.net
text: I've had the same issue after the upgrade to C7.8-2003. The workaround is to add the ip's and hostnames to /compat/linux/etc/hosts, but even though that "fixed" the IP issue, I ran into a SQLite3 issue, where fahclient cannot write to the database. See also: https://www.mail-archive.com/freebsd-stable@freebsd.org/msg138853.html
